case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. YESENIA PATRICIA RIVERA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARIA SUZANNA BARRAZA-SALAS, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT YESENIA PATRICIA RIVERA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIVERA, YESENIA PATRICIA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
